name: IDFC FIRST Select Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹3,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 10X Reward Points on select categories chosen via IDFC FIRST app
4X Reward Points on travel and dining spends
1 Reward Point per ₹100 on all other purchases

additionalBenefits: 10X rewards on select categories customizable via app
Low interest rate on revolving credit
pros: 10X rewards on customizable categories is very flexible
Good lounge access with 8 domestic + 4 international visits
IDFC FIRST's low interest rate if you revolve credit
cons: IDFC FIRST has a smaller branch/ATM network
Annual fee of ₹2,999 needs decent spend to justify
idealFor: Users who value customizable reward categories
IDFC FIRST Bank customers looking for a premium card

faqs.question: How do I select reward categories?
faqs.answer: You can choose and change your accelerated reward categories through the IDFC FIRST Bank mobile app. Changes take effect from the next billing cycle.

faqs.question: Do reward points expire?
faqs.answer: No, IDFC FIRST Select reward points never expire as long as your card account is active.

faqs.question: Is the annual fee waivable?
faqs.answer: Yes, the ₹2,999 annual fee is waived on spending ₹3,00,000 or more in the previous year.
